empty-auth-token.title: Your session is invalid
empty-auth-token.description: Please refresh this page to try onboarding again.

request-data.title: There are missing fields
request-data.description: Please return to previous steps to ensure all data is filled out

invalid-inputs.title: An error occurred
invalid-inputs.description: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix the inputs and try again.

error.title: Uh-oh!
error.description: There was an error while completing this request. Please refresh the page and try again.

init-failed.title: Session is not valid
init-failed.subtitle: Please go back to the previous page.

email-identification.title: Hey there! 👋
email-identification.subtitle: Enter your email to get started.

phone-identification.title: Hey there! 👋
phone-identification.subtitle: Enter your phone number to proceed.

errors.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number

ssn.title: What's your Social Security Number?
ssn.subtitle: We need to collect this information to verify your identity.

disclaimer.title: Your data is safe
disclaimer.description: Your SSN is encrypted and protected by a state-of-the-art secure environment

legal-status.title: What's your legal status in the U.S.?
legal-status.subtitle: We're legally required to collect this information.

statuses.permanent-resident: I have a green card/I am a permanent resident

residential-address.title: What's your residential address?
residential-address.subtitle: Make sure to provide your updated residential address (no P.O. Boxes).

errors.required: Address cannot be empty and must be a residential address (e.g. cannot be a P.O. Box)

basic-information.title: Basic data
basic-information.subtitle: Spell your full legal first, middle and last names exactly as shown on your government-issued ID.

errors.required: Please enter a date of birth
errors.invalid: Please enter a valid date of birth
errors.future: Please enter a date of birth in the past
errors.min-age: You must be at least 18 years

success.title: Success
success.description: We sent you a new code.

error.title: Error
error.description: Something went wrong. Please try again.

summary.title: Confirm your personal data
summary.subtitle: Please make sure that your personal data is accurate and there are no typos before continuing.

statuses.permanent_resident: I have a Green Card/I'm a permanent resident

identity.title: Identity
identity.ssn-skipped-subtext: You don't have a Social Security Number

invalid-inputs.title: An error occurred
invalid-inputs.description-with-message: An error occurred while saving data. {{message}}.
invalid-inputs.description-with-fields: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix these fields: {{fields}}.
invalid-inputs.description-generic: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix the inputs and try again.

incompatible-requirements-error.title: Please continue on a browser
incompatible-requirements-error.description: We don't support this onboarding flow on this application yet. Please continue on a browser.

complete.title: Submission completed!
complete.subtitle: Thanks for using Footprint to verify your identity.

sandbox-outcome.title: Test outcomes
sandbox-outcome.subtitle: Select what result you want this user to have after they complete their onboarding

step-up.title: Step up
step-up.description: Even if not required in playbook, users will upload ID photos.

test-id.label: Test ID
test-id.description: You can log into a previously created sandbox user by using the Test ID from that corresponding session.
test-id.hint: Do not use special characters or spaces.

errors.invalid: Test ID is invalid. Please remove spaces and special characters.

errors.E103: Challenge has timed out. Please try again
errors.E105: Cannot initiate a challenge of kind {{challengeKind}}
errors.E107: Login challenge initiated for non-existent user vault
errors.E108: Provide one user identifier to initiate a challenge
errors.E109: Identity document is not pending upload
errors.E113: Invalid file upload. Try another file
errors.E114: Image too large, max size is: {{maxSize}}
